mapper.select: SELECT * FROM drama_episodes WHERE drama_id = #{dramaId} ORDER BY episode_num ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE drama_episodes SET drama_id = #{dramaId}, episode_num = #{episodeNum}, title = #{title}, video_id = #{videoId}, video_url = #{videoUrl}, vod_video_id = #{vodVideoId}, vod_status = #{vodStatus}, video_size = #{videoSize}, vod_cover_url = #{vodCoverUrl}, duration = #{duration}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
